text: AI is transforming the modern workplace. One major impact is automation, where machines handle repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling. This allows employees to focus on more complex work. Many productivity tools now use AI, such as software that analyzes emails or generates reports quickly. However, this doesn't mean humans are replaced. Instead, we see human-AI collaboration, where people and machines work together, combining creativity with efficiency. These changes mean some jobs may evolve or disappear, but new roles like AI trainers or ethics specialists are emerging. Understanding and adapting to these tools is becoming essential for career growth.
